FF14COMBO-COMBO_POWER.title: Combo
FF14COMBO-COMBO_POWER.description: Decreases by 1 at the end of your turn.
FF14COMBO-COMBO_POWER.smartDescription: Decreases by 1 at the end of your turn.
FF14COMBO-BLEEDING_POWER.title: Bleeding
FF14COMBO-BLEEDING_POWER.description: Before this enemy acts, it loses HP equal to its Bleeding. At the end of its turn, Bleeding is reduced by 1.
FF14COMBO-BLEEDING_POWER.smartDescriptio: Before this enemy acts, it loses {Amount} HP. At the end of its turn, Bleeding is reduced by 1.
FF14COMBO-PRECISION_COMBO_POWER.title: Precision Combo
FF14COMBO-PRECISION_COMBO_POWER.descript: Consecutive Attacks in a defined combo deal 50% more damage after the first Attack.
FF14COMBO-PRECISION_COMBO_POWER.smartDes: Consecutive Attacks in a defined combo deal 50% more damage after the first Attack.
FF14COMBO-REDEMPTION_SWORD_POWER.title: Redemption Sword
FF14COMBO-REDEMPTION_SWORD_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, deal the HP lost by ALL players this turn to {TargetName}.
FF14COMBO-REDEMPTION_SWORD_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your next turn, deal {RetaliationDamage} damage to {TargetName}.
FF14COMBO-REQUIESCAT_PRAYER_POWER.title: Requiescat Prayer
FF14COMBO-REQUIESCAT_PRAYER_POWER.descri: Allows Requiescat blades to be played. Decreases by 1 at the end of your turn.
FF14COMBO-REQUIESCAT_PRAYER_POWER.smartD: Allows Requiescat blades to be played. Decreases by 1 at the end of your turn.
